task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Build Cache Economic Model for Monorepo CI. Convert the embedded noisy operational evidence into a defensible action plan within the embedded remediation budget. Rebuild the decision logic, identify threshold crossings, run a sensitivity analysis (including 5% sensitivity checks that trigger expert-review if classifications change), and produce a review-ready decision table. Deliver an executable spreadsheet (build_cache_roi.xlsx) containing formulas and intermediate calculations and a CI policy document (ci_policy.md) with row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final prioritized decision table. Use only the provided embedded packet; do not invent or import external data. Mark unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
